chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1909 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 19.11.2025 Petitioners 1 and 2, namely Mst. Jameelan and Mashooque Ali are present in person Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh Ms. Shabana Naheed, Assistant PG for the State SIP Meharban of PS Adilpur, District Ghotki >>>>>..<<<<< SIP Meharban, Investigating Officer Crime No.113 of 2025 of Police Station Adilpur, District Ghotki is present and files statement. He submits that he has recorded 161 CrPC statement of Petitioner No.1, namely Mst. Jameelan in which she has stated that nobody has enticed or abducted her but she has contracted marriage with Petitioner No.2, with her own free will. She further stated that the FIR lodged against her husband and others is false and fabricated. The Investigating Officer further submits that after completing the investigation in view of the statement of the alleged abductee, Mst. Jameelan, the Petitioner No.1, he will submit the report before the concerned Court of Law having jurisdiction for disposal of case under “C” class. On such statement of the Investigation Officer, Petitioners present in person being satisfied seek disposal of the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of along with listed application, if any, with directions to Investigating Officer to file such report, as suggested by him within 15 (fifteen) days before the Court of Law having jurisdiction. However, the official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with the law.

Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of along with listed application, if any, with directions to Investigating Officer to file such report, as suggested by him within 15 (fifteen) days before the Court of Law having jurisdiction. However, the official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
